modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Course schedule not visible on USDGo platform.

full_description_text: User cannot see their course schedule on USDGo. Classes are missing from the display. This issue is affecting their ability to view important information. User is confused and needs assistance.
short_description: Course schedule not visible on USDGo platform.
description: User cannot see their course schedule on USDGo. Classes are missing from the display. This issue is affecting their ability to view important information. User is confused and needs assistance.
